sentence: Hoje não faz sol nem calor.
ipa: ˈɔʒe ˈnɐ̃w̃ ˈfaz ˈsɔɫ ˈnẽj̃ kaˈloɾ
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: No unstressed reduction: 'hoje' -> [ˈɔʒe], 'calor' -> [kaˈlɔɾ] with full [a], per albuquerque2010; coda /z/ 'faz' -> [z] alveolar and velarised coda [ɫ] 'sol' from the EP baseline per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O bilhete custa doze euros e meio.
ipa: o biˈlɛte ˈkusta ˈdɔze ˈewɾos i ˈmejo
gloss_en: The ticket costs twelve euros fifty.
notes: Full unstressed vowels 'euros' -> [ˈewɾos] and digraph simplification 'bilhete' -> [biˈlɛte] ([l], no [ʎ]) with the 'ei' diphthong retained, per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira às nove horas.
ipa: ˈtɛno kõˈsuɫta na ˈkĩta ˈfejɾa as ˈnɔve ˈɔɾas
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Alveolar coda /s/ in 'às'/'horas' -> [s] (no Lisbon chiado) and ⟨nh⟩ -> [n] in 'tenho' -> [ˈtɛno], per albuquerque2010.

sentence: A minha família mora numa casa antiga.
ipa: a ˈmina faˈmilia ˈmɔɾa ˈnuma ˈkaza ɐ̃ˈtiɡa
gloss_en: My family lives in an old house.
notes: ⟨nh⟩ -> [n] in 'minha' -> [ˈmina] and full unstressed vowels; 'casa antiga' liaison per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Vira à direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: ˈviɾa a diˈɾejta i ˈsɛɡe ˈsẽpre ẽj̃ ˈfrẽte
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Alveolar rhotic [ɾ]/[r] in 'vira'/'direita'/'frente' and retained 'ei' diphthong per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Este bacalhau está muito salgado.
ipa: ˈeste bakaˈlaw eˈsta ˈmujto saˈɫɡado
gloss_en: This cod is very salty.
notes: ⟨lh⟩ -> [l] in 'bacalhau' -> [bakaˈlaw], alveolar coda [s] in 'este' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'salgado' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Onde fica a estação de comboios?
ipa: ˈõde ˈfika a estaˈsɐ̃w̃ de kõˈbojos
gloss_en: Where is the train station?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'estação' retained and alveolar coda per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Quantos quilos de pão queres?
ipa: ˈkwɐ̃tos ˈkilos de ˈpɐ̃w̃ ˈkɛɾes
gloss_en: How many kilos of bread do you want?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'pão' and full unstressed vowels 'quilos' -> [ˈkilos] per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Se chovesse, ficávamos em casa.
ipa: se ʃoˈvɛs̺e fiˈkavamos ẽj̃ ˈkaza
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'chovesse', full unstressed vowels 'ficávamos' -> [fiˈkavamos] and alveolar coda per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Ontem comprei peixe fresco no mercado.
ipa: ˈõtẽj̃ kõˈprej ˈpejʃe ˈfresko no meˈrkado
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fresh fish at the market.
notes: Retained 'ei' diphthong in 'comprei'/'peixe' and alveolar rhotic [r] in 'mercado' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar até ao Porto.
ipa: ˈpaɾa o ˈano ˈvo viaˈʒaɾ aˈtɛ ao ˈporto
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Porto.
notes: 'até ao' vowel liaison and full [o] in 'ano'/'Porto'; alveolar rhotic per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: ˈliɡa me ˈmajs ˈtarde poɾ faˈvɔɾ
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Alveolar coda [s] in 'mais' and alveolar rhotic in 'tarde'/'favor' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Olá, tudo bem contigo?
ipa: oˈla ˈtudo ˈbẽj̃ kõˈtiɡo
gloss_en: Hi, are you doing well?
notes: Nasal [ẽ] in 'bem' and full [o] in 'tudo'/'contigo' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Quem não arrisca, não petisca.
ipa: ˈkẽj̃ ˈnɐ̃w̃ aˈriska ˈnɐ̃w̃ peˈtiska
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' — the EP uvular is absent — per albuquerque2010.

sentence: O carro corre depressa na estrada molhada.
ipa: o ˈkaro ˈkɔre deˈprɛs̺a na eˈstrada moˈlada
gloss_en: The car speeds down the wet road.
notes: Alveolar rhotic in 'carro'/'corre' and ⟨lh⟩ -> [l] in 'molhada' -> [moˈlada] per albuquerque2010.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem do Douro.
ipa: o meˈlɔɾ ˈvino ˈbrɐ̃ko ˈvẽj̃ do ˈdoɾo
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from the Douro.
notes: ⟨lh⟩ -> [l] in 'melhor' -> [meˈlɔɾ], ⟨nh⟩ -> [n] in 'vinho' -> [ˈvino] and the 'ou' diphthong in 'Douro' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: A velha ponte de pedra ainda aguenta.
ipa: a ˈvɛla ˈpõte de ˈpɛdra ˈaj̃da aˈɡẽta
gloss_en: The old stone bridge still holds.
notes: ⟨lh⟩ -> [l] in 'velha' -> [ˈvɛla], nasal [õ] in 'ponte' and open mid [ɛ] in 'pedra' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Nunca vi um céu tão azul.
ipa: ˈnũka ˈvi ˈũ ˈsɛw ˈtɐ̃w̃ aˈzuɫ
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'céu', nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'tão' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'azul' per albuquerque2010; nasal diphthong from the EP baseline per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O sol pôs-se atrás da montanha.
ipa: o ˈsɔɫ ˈpos se aˈtras da mõˈtana
gloss_en: The sun set behind the mountain.
notes: Velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol', ⟨nh⟩ -> [n] in 'montanha' -> [mõˈtana] and alveolar coda [s] in 'atrás' per albuquerque2010.

sentence: Ele trouxe rosas roxas do jardim.
ipa: ˈele ˈtrose ˈrɔzas ˈrɔʃas do ʒaˈrdĩ
gloss_en: He brought red roses from the garden.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] in 'rosas'/'roxas' and the 'ou' diphthong in 'trouxe' per albuquerque2010.
